'''Rish''' was the [[Star/Legends|sun]] of the [[Rishi system/Legends|Rishi system]]. The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Rishi/Legends|Rishi]] [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] this star.

{{Star-stub}}
